entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 41
entries.excerpt: “And it came to pass at the end of two full years, that Pharaoh dreamed” (Gen 41:1). Pharaoh saw in his dream ears of grain of two kinds and cows of two kinds. To interpret this would not have been difficult for anyone; but in order that Joseph might be the one to interpret the dream, the meaning of the dream was hidden from Pharaoh’s wise men. And when the cupbearer after two years reminded Pharaoh of Joseph, Pharaoh sent and brought him out of prison.…
